data.description: Iran is striking back across the Middle East, launching waves of missiles and drones at Israel, US bases and Gulf states including Saudi Arabia, the UAE and Bahrain, as the regional war escalates on multiple fronts.​

data.title: Aemetis announces Q4 and full year 2025 results, with expansion of Dairy RNG platform.
data.description: In recent data released, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has fallen to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This equates to approximately 9 million people being employed. Additionally, the GDP has risen by 3.7% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and showcasing strong economic growth. The stock market also saw a surge, with the main index increasing by 2.5%. Analysts are optimistic about the future outlook of the economy, citing these recent numbers as evidence of a robust and thriving market.

data.title: TURBO ENERGY ANNOUNCES $3.25 MILLION REGISTERED DIRECT OFFERING WITH A SINGLE GLOBAL INSTITUTIONAL INVESTOR
data.description: Valencia, Spain, March 12, 2026 - Turbo Energy, S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB), a leading global provider of AI-optimized solar energy storage technologies, has recently disclosed a securities purchase agreement with a single global institutional investor. The agreement involves the sale of 1,000,000 of the Company’s American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at an individual price of $3.25 per ADS in a registered direct offering. This transaction is anticipated to generate approximately $3.25 million in gross proceeds, excluding placement agent commissions and other offering expenses. The closing of this offering is scheduled around March 13, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

data.title: Integer Appoints James Flanagan and Aaron Kapito to Board of Directors
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Integer Holdings Corporation, a prominent medical device contract development and manufacturing organization listed on NYSE as ITGR, revealed the appointment of James Flanagan as an independent director to their Board of Directors. This announcement came alongside the appointment of another new board member, Aaron Kapito, following a cooperation agreement with Irenic Capital Management, LP and its affiliates. Flanagan and Kapito join the Board during a strategic phase for the company, bringing their expertise to further the organization's goals and objectives.

data.title: Aduro Signs Offtake LOI for Hydrochemolytic™ Oil with Pilot-to-FOAK Validation Program
data.description: Aduro has entered into a Letter of Intent (LOI) with a renowned global commodities trader to assess its Hydrochemolytic™ oil and acquire the initial production batch from the upcoming First of a Kind (FOAK) facility.

data.title: Sunrun is the Number One Provider of Energy Independence for Americans, Expanding the Nation’s Largest Residential Distributed Power Plant
data.description: In 2025, the residential energy storage sector witnessed a total installation of 3.1 gigawatt-hours (GWh). Sunrun's reported deployment of 1.5 GWh accounted for almost half of this amount. This reaffirms Sunrun's position as the leading home storage provider and operator of distributed power plants in the United States.

data.title: Cadrenal Therapeutics Highlights Research Supporting 12-LOX Inhibition in Reducing Inflammation in Obesity and Type 2 Diabetes
data.description: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on March 12, 2026, Cadrenal Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CVKD) shared promising scientific discoveries regarding its novel treatment, CAD-1005, a 12-lipoxygenase (12-LOX) inhibitor. The biopharmaceutical company is focused on developing groundbreaking therapies for severe immune and thrombotic illnesses. Recent research revealed CAD-1005's potential in addressing the inflammatory effects of obesity and Type 2 diabetes. This innovative inhibitor shows promise in targeting these conditions, marking a significant advancement in the field of medical treatment.

data.title: Incannex Strengthens Clinical Development Pathway for IHL-42X Following Positive Phase 2 Outcomes
data.description: A revised Phase 2 trial has been planned to optimize dosages with the goal of expediting development and facilitating a more efficient Phase 3 initiative. This enhanced Phase 2 study seeks to fast-track the process and aid in the seamless progression towards Phase 3.

data.title: Beamr to Demonstrate ML-Safe Video Data Compression for Physical AI at GTC 2026
data.description: In Herzliya, Israel on March 12, 2026, Beamr Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: BMR) shared plans to exhibit a verified machine learning-friendly video data compression for practical artificial intelligence uses at GTC 2026. Their showcase will feature GPU-accelerated processes tailored for autonomous vehicles (AV), offering a substantial file size decrease of up to 50% without compromising the accuracy of machine learning (ML) models.

data.title: BusyBee Reaches 3 Million K-12 Submissions as AI Grading Expands to PDFs, Images, and Visual Content
data.description: In the span of a year, the acceptance rate among teachers for AI-generated grades has increased significantly from 48% to 63%, marking a notable 15-point rise. This rise was observed across a vast sample size of 3 million authentic classroom submissions. Evidently, in the educational hub of OREM, Utah, as of March 12, 2026, when educators employing BusyBee software assess an AI-proposed grade, they are increasingly inclined to accept it as-is, without making any revisions.

data.title: Calumet Announces $150 Million Private Placement of Additional 9.75% Senior Notes due 2031
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Calumet, Inc. disclosed that its subsidiaries, Calumet Specialty Products Partners, L.P. and Calumet Finance Corp., are planning to issue new bonds, dependent on market circumstances. Calumet is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CLMT.

data.title: Zoho Backstage positioned as the Leader in the SPARK Matrix™: Event Experience Platform, 2025 by QKS Group
data.description: The QKS Group's SPARK Matrix™ evaluates and ranks top Event Experience Platform vendors. Zoho, known for its robust technology in this field, has garnered high ratings in technology, excellence, and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Singular Genomics Names the Spatial Technologies Unit at Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center a G4X™ Center of Excellence
data.description: Singular Genomics revealed today that the Spatial Technologies Unit (STU) at Beth Israel Deaconess has been designated as the initial G4X Early Access Program site, aiming to enhance the global adoption of G4X. This move emphasizes the unit's pivotal role in pioneering the G4X program. The announcement was made in both San Diego and Boston on March 12, 2026.
